name: syslog_sync_size_threshold
info: When the accumulated syslog data reaches this threshold, the system automatically performs disk synchronization.Value 0 disables this function.

name: ob_enable_utl_http
info: controls whether UTL_HTTP is enabled

name: ob_python_home
info: specifies the python home path

name: async_ps_cursor_max_count
info: the max count of async ps cursor. The default value is 0. Range: [0, 1024] in integer

name: external_table_disk_cache_max_percentage
info: The maximum ratio of external table disk space to datafile_size in shared-nothing mode, ranges from [0, 95] in integer, with a default of 50

name: _ob_enable_pl_dynamic_stack_check
info: Enable or disable dynamic stack check when executing PL.

name: utl_file_open_max
info: the maximum number of utl files that can be opened simultaneously in a single node under the Oracle model.

name: _use_odps_jni_connector
info: Enable or disable jni connector for external odps table

name: ob_java_connector_path
info: specifies the connector path for external table with enabled option: ob_enable_java_env

name: ob_java_opts
info: specifies the java opts path for external table with enabled option: ob_enable_java_env

name: ob_java_home
info: specifies the java home path for external table with enabled option: ob_enable_java_env

name: ob_enable_java_env
info: Enable or disable java env for external table.

name: plugins_load
info: The plugins you want to load when starting observer. Note that plugins cannot be loaded dynamically, you should restart the observer when you change the parameter. Format: 'libsoname1.so:on,libsoname2.so:off' which `on'(default) means the plugin is enabled, `off' means the plugin is disabled(don't load),

name: ob_storage_s3_url_encode_type
info: Determines the URL encoding method for S3 requests."default": Uses the S3 standard URL encoding method."compliantRfc3986Encoding": Uses URL encoding that adheres to the RFC 3986 standard.

name: unit_gc_wait_time
info: The maximum waiting time for unit gc, The default value is 1min. Range: [0,  30d].

name: _enable_dbms_job_package
info: Control whether can use DBMS_JOB package.

name: enable_ob_error_msg_style
info: A switch that determines whether to use the ORA-xx or OBE-xx error code format for ORA error codes, with a default value of True to use the OBE-xx format.The default value is True. Value: False means we use the ORA-xx format, True means we use the OBE-xx format.

name: clog_io_isolation_mode
info: Specifies the I/O isolation mode for Commit Log (clog). Values: 1 - Non-isolation mode (disable I/O isolation), 2 - Full isolation mode (enable I/O isolation). Example: 1=Off, 2=On

name: io_scheduler_thread_count
info: Range: [1, 16] in integer. This parameter is used to adjust the number of threads in the I/O scheduler. The default value is 4. You can set it within the range of 1 to 16 to control the concurrency level of the I/O scheduler.

name: strict_check_os_params
info: A switch that determines whether to enable strict OS parameter check mode, defaulting to true and can be set to false to bypass strict checks.Value: True: allowed; False: allowed but not suggested

name: enable_rpc_authentication_bypass
info: specifies whether allow OMS service to connect cluster and provide service when rpc authentication is turned on.

name: sql_protocol_min_tls_version
info: SQL SSL control options, used to specify the minimum SSL/TLS version number. values: none, TLSv1, TLSv1.1, TLSv1.2, TLSv1.3

name: rpc_server_authentication_method
info: specifies rpc server authentication method. ALL: support all authentication methods. NONE: without authentication. SSL_NO_ENCRYPT: authentication by SSL handshake but not encrypt the communication channel. SSL_IO: authentication by SSL handshake and encrypt the communication channel

name: rpc_client_authentication_method
info: specifies rpc client authentication method. NONE: without authentication. SSL_NO_ENCRYPT: authentication by SSL handshake but not encrypt the communication channel. SSL_IO: authentication by SSL handshake and encrypt the communication channel

name: observer_id
info: the unique id that been assigned by rootservice for each observer in cluster, default: 0 (invalid id), Range: [1, 18446744073709551615]

name: local_ip
info: the IP address of the machine on which the ObServer will be installed

name: enable_dblink
info: Enable or disable dblink

name: global_background_cpu_quota
info: When enable_global_background_resource_isolation is True, specify the number of vCPUs allocated to the background tasks-1 for the CPU is not limited by the cgroup

name: enable_global_background_resource_isolation
info: When set to false, foreground and background tasks are isolated within the tenant; When set to true, isolate background tasks individually upon tenant-level

name: enable_cgroup
info: when set to false, cgroup will not init; when set to true but cgroup root dir is not ready, print ERROR

name: sql_net_thread_count
info: the number of global mysql I/O threads. Range: [0, 64] in integer, default value is 0, 0 stands for old value GCONF.net_thread_count

name: sql_login_thread_count
info: the number of threads for sql login request. Range: [0, 32] in integer, 0 stands for use default thread count defined in TG.the default thread count for login request in TG is normal:6 mini-mode:2

name: tcp_keepcnt
info: The maximum number of keepalive probes TCP should send before dropping the connection. Take effect for new established connections. Range: [1,+∞)

name: tcp_keepintvl
info: The time (in seconds) between individual keepalive probes. Take effect for new established connections. Range: [1s, +∞]

name: tcp_keepidle
info: The time (in seconds) the connection needs to remain idle before TCP starts sending keepalive probe. Take effect for new established connections. Range: [1s, +∞]

name: enable_tcp_keepalive
info: enable TCP keepalive for the TCP connection of sql protocol. Take effect for new established connections.

name: ob_ratelimit_stat_period
info: the time interval to update observer's maximum bandwidth to a certain region.

name: enable_ob_ratelimit
info: enable ratelimit between regions for RPC connection.

name: ssl_external_kms_info
info: when using the external key management center for ssl, this parameter will store some key management information

name: use_large_pages
info: used to manage the database's use of large pages, values: false, true, only

name: schema_history_recycle_interval
info: the time interval between the schedules of schema history recyle task. Range: [0s, +∞)

name: _bloom_filter_ratio
info: The px bloom filter false-positive rate. Range: [0,100]

name: use_ipv6
info: Whether this server uses ipv6 address

name: ssl_client_authentication
info: enable server SSL support. Takes effect after ca/cert/key file is configured correctly.

name: stack_size
info: the size of routine execution stackRange: [512K, 20M]

name: px_task_size
info: to be removed

name: dtl_buffer_size
info: to be removed

name: micro_block_merge_verify_level
info: specify what kind of verification should be done when merging micro block. 0 : no verification will be done 1 : verify encoding algorithm, encoded micro block will be read to ensure data is correct 2 : verify encoding and compression algorithm, besides encoding verification, compressed block will be decompressed to ensure data is correct3 : verify encoding, compression algorithm and lost write protect

name: builtin_db_data_verify_cycle
info: check cycle of db data. Range: [0, 360] in integer. Unit: day. 0: check nothing. 1-360: check all data every specified days. The default value is 20. The real check cycle maybe longer than the specified value for insuring performance.

name: tablet_size
info: default tablet size, has to be a multiple of 2M

name: sys_bkgd_migration_change_member_list_timeout
info: the timeout for migration change member list retry. The default value is 20s. Range: [0s,24h]

name: sys_bkgd_migration_retry_num
info: retry num limit during migration. Range: [3, 100] in integer

name: sync_io_thread_count
info: The number of io threads for synchronizing request on each device. The default value is 0. Range: [0,1024] in integer

name: disk_io_thread_count
info: The number of io threads on each disk. The default value is 8. Range: [2,32] in even integer

name: sys_bkgd_net_percentage
info: the net percentage of sys background net. Range: [0, 100] in integer

name: data_disk_usage_limit_percentage
info: the safe use percentage of data diskRange: [50,100] in integer

name: data_storage_error_tolerance_time
info: time to tolerate disk read failure, after that, the disk status will be set error. Range [10s,7200s]. The default value is 300s

name: data_storage_warning_tolerance_time
info: time to tolerate disk read failure, after that, the disk status will be set warning. Range [1s,300s]. The default value is 5s

name: storage_meta_cache_priority
info: storage meta cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: fuse_row_cache_priority
info: fuse row cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: bf_cache_miss_count_threshold
info: bf cache miss count threshold, 0 means disable bf cache. Range:[0, )

name: bf_cache_priority
info: bf cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: user_row_cache_priority
info: user row cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: user_block_cache_priority
info: user block cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: index_block_cache_priority
info: index cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: opt_tab_stat_cache_priority
info: tab stat cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: tablet_ls_cache_priority
info: tablet ls cache priority. Range:[1, )

name: location_cache_refresh_sql_timeout
info: The timeout used for refreshing location cache by SQL. Range: [1ms, +∞)

name: location_cache_refresh_rpc_timeout
info: The timeout used for refreshing location cache by RPC. Range: [1ms, +∞)

name: all_server_list
info: all server addr in cluster

name: location_cache_refresh_min_interval
info: the time interval in which no request for location cache renewal will be executed. The default value is 100 milliseconds. [0s, +∞)

name: location_fetch_concurrency
info: the maximum number of the tasks for fetching location cache concurrently. Range: [1, 1000]

name: location_refresh_thread_count
info: the number of threads for fetching location cache in the background. Range: (1, 64]

name: virtual_table_location_cache_expire_time
info: expiration time for virtual table location info in partition location cache. Range: [1s, +∞)

name: standby_fetch_log_bandwidth_limit
info: the max bandwidth in bytes per second that can be occupied by the sum of the synchronizing log from primary cluster of all servers in the standby cluster

name: rpc_timeout
info: the time during which a RPC request is permitted to execute before it is terminated

name: ignore_replay_checksum_error
info: specifies whether error raised from the memtable replay checksum validation can be ignored. Value: True:ignored; False: not ignored

name: row_compaction_update_limit
info: maximum update count before trigger row compaction. Range: [1, 6400]

name: clog_sync_time_warn_threshold
info: the time given to the commit log synchronization between a leader and its followers before a \\'warning\\' message is printed in the log file.  Range: [1ms,1000ms]

name: trx_2pc_retry_interval
info: the time interval between the retries in case of failure during a transaction\\'s two-phase commit phase. Range: [1ms,5000ms]

name: enable_sys_unit_standalone
info: specifies whether sys unit standalone deployment is turned on. Value:  True:turned on  False: turned off

name: server_balance_cpu_mem_tolerance_percent
info: specifies the tolerance (in percentage) of the unbalance of the cpu/memory utilization among all servers. The average cpu/memory utilization is calculated by dividing the total cpu/memory by the number of servers. server balancer will start a rebalancing task when the deviation between the average usage and some server load is greater than this tolerance Range: [1, 100] in percentage

name: server_balance_disk_tolerance_percent
info: specifies the tolerance (in percentage) of the unbalance of the disk space utilization among all servers. The average disk space utilization is calculated by dividing the total space by the number of servers. server balancer will start a rebalancing task when the deviation between the average usage and some server load is greater than this tolerance Range: [1, 100] in percentage

name: server_balance_critical_disk_waterlevel
info: disk water level to determine server balance strategy

name: __min_full_resource_pool_memory
info: the min memory value which is specified for a full resource pool.

name: balancer_log_interval
info: the time interval between logging the load-balancing task\\'s statistics. Range: [1s, +∞)

name: balancer_task_timeout
info: the time to execute the load-balancing task before it is terminated. Range: [1s, +∞)

name: balancer_tolerance_percentage
info: specifies the tolerance (in percentage) of the unbalance of the disk space utilization among all units. The average disk space utilization is calculated by dividing the total space by the number of units. For example, say balancer_tolerance_percentage is set to 10 and a tenant has two units in the system, the average disk use for each unit should be about the same, thus 50% of the total value. Therefore, the system will start a rebalancing task when any unit\\'s disk space goes beyond +-10% of the average usage. Range: [1, 100) in percentage

name: enable_rereplication
info: specifies whether the auto-replication is turned on. Value:  True:turned on  False: turned off

name: resource_hard_limit
info: system utilization should not be large than resource_hard_limit

name: log_storage_warning_trigger_percentage
info: The performance decrease percentage threshold that may trigger a log disk failure. The higher the value, the more sensitive it is. The default value is 0, Range: [0,50].The default value is 0, which means the log disk will be considered to have failure only if any IO RT exceeds log_storage_warning_tolerance_time. If the value is greater than 0, which means the log disk will be considered to have failure only if current IO throughput < (normal throughput * log_storage_warning_trigger_percentage / 100) and performance degradation has been ongoing for log_storage_warning_tolerance_time seconds. If the parameter needs to be set, it is recommended to set a value less than 10 to avoid misjudgment.

name: arbitration_degradation_policy
info: specifies the degradation policy, whether to check network connectivity with RS before arbitration degrades. Value: LS_POLICY, CLUSTER_POLICY LS_POLICY: default policy. CLUSTER_POLICY: check network connectivity with RS before arbitration degrades. Do not degrade when not connected. Then, switch log stream leaders to the replicas which are connected with RS.

name: log_storage_warning_tolerance_time
info: time to tolerate log disk io delay, after that, the disk status will be set warning. Range: [1s,300s]

name: log_disk_percentage
info: the percentage of disk space used by the log files. Range: [0,99] in integer;only effective when parameter log_disk_size is 0;when log_disk_percentage is 0: a) if the data and the log are on the same disk, means log_disk_percentage = 30 b) if the data and the log are on the different disks, means log_disk_perecentage = 90

name: log_disk_size
info: the size of disk space used by the log files. Range: [0, +∞)

name: recyclebin_object_expire_time
info: recyclebin object expire time, default 0 that means auto purge recyclebin off. Range: [0s, +∞)

name: ob_event_history_recycle_interval
info: the time to recycle event history. Range: [1d, 180d]

name: enable_major_freeze
info: specifies whether major_freeze function is turned on. Value:  True:turned on;  False: turned off

name: enable_ddl
info: specifies whether DDL operation is turned on. Value:  True:turned on;  False: turned off

name: min_observer_version
info: the min observer version

name: tablet_meta_table_check_interval
info: the time interval that observer compares tablet meta table with local ls replica info and make adjustments to ensure the correctness of tablet meta table. Range: [1m,+∞)

name: ls_meta_table_check_interval
info: the time interval that observer compares ls meta table with local ls replica info and make adjustments to ensure the correctness of ls meta table. Range: [1ms,+∞)

name: tablet_meta_table_scan_batch_count
info: the number of tablet replica info that will be read by each request on the tablet-related system tables during procedures such as load-balancing, daily merge, election and etc. Range:(0,65536]

name: rootservice_ready_check_interval
info: the interval between the schedule of the rootservice restart task while restart failed Range: [100000us, 1m]

name: server_check_interval
info: the time interval between schedules of a task that examines the __all_server table. Range: [1s, +∞)

name: migration_disable_time
info: the duration in which the observer stays in the \\'block_migrate_in\\' status, which means it is not allowed to migrate into the server. Range: [1s, +∞)

name: server_permanent_offline_time
info: the time interval between any two heartbeats beyond which a server is considered to be \\'permanently\\' offline. Range: [20s,+∞)

name: enable_sys_table_ddl
info: specifies whether a \\'system\\' table is allowed be to created manually. Value: True: allowed; False: not allowed

name: rootservice_async_task_queue_size
info: the size of the queue for all asynchronous tasks at rootserver. Range: [8, 131072] in integer

name: rootservice_async_task_thread_count
info: maximum of threads allowed for executing asynchronous task at rootserver. Range: [1, 10]

name: lease_time
info: Lease for current heartbeat. If the root server does not received any heartbeat from an observer in lease_time seconds, that observer is considered to be offline. Not recommended for modification. Range: [1s, 5m]

name: plan_cache_evict_interval
info: time interval for periodic plan cache eviction. Range: [0s, +∞)

name: data_disk_write_limit_percentage
info: used to stop user write operations. When the user data disk reaches this watermark, SQL requests will report that the disk is full. The configuration should be greater than data_disk_usage_limit_percentage, with the recommended setting being: (1 - memstore_limit_size / data_disk_size) * 100%

name: memstore_limit_percentage
info: used in calculating the value of MEMSTORE_LIMIT parameter: memstore_limit_percentage = memstore_limit / memory_size, where MEMORY_SIZE is determined when the tenant is created. Range: [0, 100). 1. the system will use memstore_limit_percentage if only memstore_limit_percentage is set.2. the system will use _memstore_limit_percentage if both memstore_limit_percentage and _memstore_limit_percentage is set.3. the system will adjust automatically if both memstore_limit_percentage and _memstore_limit_percentage set to 0(by default).

name: large_query_threshold
info: threshold for execution time beyond which a request may be paused and rescheduled as a \\'large request\\', 0ms means disable \\'large request\\'. Range: [0ms, +∞)

name: large_query_worker_percentage
info: the percentage of the workers reserved to serve large query request. Range: [0, 100] in percentage

name: workers_per_cpu_quota
info: the ratio(integer) between the number of system allocated workers vs the maximum number of threads that can be scheduled concurrently. Range: [2, 20]

name: location_cache_cpu_quota
info: the number of vCPUs allocated for the requests regarding location info of the core tables. Range: [0,10] in integer

name: server_cpu_quota_max
info: the number of maximal vCPUs allocated to the server tenant(a special internal tenant that exists on every observer). 0 stands for adaptive. Range: [0, 16]

name: server_cpu_quota_min
info: the number of minimal vCPUs allocated to the server tenant(a special internal tenant that exists on every observer). 0 stands for adaptive. Range: [0, 16]

name: enable_sql_operator_dump
info: specifies whether sql operators (sort/hash join/material/window function/interm result/...) allowed to write to disk

name: autoinc_cache_refresh_interval
info: auto-increment service cache refresh sync_value in this interval, with default 3600s. Range: [100ms, +∞)

name: memory_chunk_cache_size
info: the maximum size of memory cached by memory chunk cache. Range: [0M,], 0 stands for adaptive

name: cache_wash_threshold
info: size of remaining memory at which cache eviction will be triggered. Range: [0,+∞)

name: memory_limit_percentage
info: the size of the memory reserved for internal use(for testing purpose). Range: [10, 95]

name: syslog_file_uncompressed_count
info: specifies the minimum number of the syslog files that will not be compressed. Each syslog file can occupy at most 256MB disk space. When this value is set to 0, all syslog file may be compressed. Range: [0, +∞) in integer

name: syslog_compress_func
info: compress function name for syslog files, values: none, zstd_1.0, zstd_1.3.8

name: syslog_disk_size
info: the size of disk space used by the syslog files. Range: [0, +∞)

name: enable_syslog_recycle
info: specifies whether log file recycling is turned on. Value: True：turned on; False: turned off

name: enable_syslog_wf
info: specifies whether any log message with a log level higher than \\'WARN\\' would be printed into a separate file with a suffix of \\'wf\\'

name: enable_async_syslog
info: specifies whether use async log for observer.log, elec.log and rs.log

name: max_syslog_file_count
info: specifies the maximum number of the log files that can co-exist before the log file recycling kicks in. Each log file can occupy at most 256MB disk space. When this value is set to 0, no log file will be removed. Range: [0, +∞) in integer

name: diag_syslog_per_error_limit
info: DIAG syslog limitation for each error per second, exceeding syslog would be truncated

name: syslog_io_bandwidth_limit
info: Syslog IO bandwidth limitation, exceeding syslog would be truncated. Use 0 to disable ERROR log.

name: alert_log_level
info: specifies the current level of alert log. There are INFO, WARN, ERROR, three different log levels.

name: syslog_level
info: specifies the current level of logging. There are DEBUG, TRACE, WDIAG, EDIAG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, seven different log levels.

name: obconfig_url
info: URL for OBConfig service

name: cluster_id
info: ID of the cluster

name: cluster
info: Name of the cluster

name: rootservice_list
info: a list of servers against which election candidate is checked for validation

name: weak_read_version_refresh_interval
info: the time interval to refresh cluster weak read version Range: [50ms, +∞)

name: default_compress
info: default compress strategy for create new table within oracle mode

name: default_row_format
info: default row format in mysql mode

name: default_compress_func
info: default compress function name for create new table, values: none, lz4_1.0, snappy_1.0, zstd_1.0, zstd_1.3.8

name: enable_upgrade_mode
info: specifies whether upgrade mode is turned on. If turned on, daily merger and balancer will be disabled. Value: True: turned on; False: turned off;

name: enable_perf_event
info: specifies whether to enable perf event feature. The default value is True.

name: dead_socket_detection_timeout
info: specify a tcp_user_timeout for RFC5482. A zero value makes the option disabled, Range: [0, 2h]

name: debug_sync_timeout
info: Enable the debug sync facility and optionally specify a default wait timeout in micro seconds. A zero value keeps the facility disabled, Range: [0, +∞]

name: enable_rich_error_msg
info: specifies whether add ip:port, time and trace id to user error message. The default value is FALSE.

name: enable_record_trace_id
info: specifies whether record app trace id is turned on.

name: enable_sql_audit
info: specifies whether SQL audit is turned on. The default value is TRUE. Value: TRUE: turned on FALSE: turned off

name: max_string_print_length
info: truncate very long string when printing to log file. Range:[0,]

name: enable_record_trace_log
info: specifies whether to always record the trace log. The default value is True.

name: trace_log_slow_query_watermark
info: the threshold of execution time (in milliseconds) of a query beyond which it is considered to be a \\'slow query\\'. Range: [1ms,+∞)

name: cpu_count
info: the number of CPU\\'s in the system. If this parameter is set to zero, the number will be set according to sysconf; otherwise, this parameter is used. Range: [0,+∞) in integer

name: system_memory
info: the memory reserved for internal use which cannot be allocated to any outer-tenant, and should be determined to guarantee every server functions normally. Range: [0M,)

name: memory_limit
info: the size of the memory reserved for internal use(for testing purpose), 0 means follow memory_limit_percentage. Range: 0, [1G,).

name: tenant_task_queue_size
info: the size of the task queue for each tenant. Range: [1024,+∞)

name: high_priority_net_thread_count
info: the number of rpc I/O threads for high priority messages, 0 means set off. Range: [0, 64] in integer

name: net_thread_count
info: the number of rpc/mysql I/O threads for Libeasy. Range: [0, 128] in integer, 0 stands for max(6, CPU_NUM/8)

name: internal_sql_execute_timeout
info: the number of microseconds an internal DML request is permitted to execute before it is terminated. Range: [1000us, 1h]

name: enable_logservice
info: specifies whether to use logservice. The default value is False

name: logservice_access_point
info: the access point string for logservice. The default value is empty str

name: ob_startup_mode
info: specifies the observer startup mode

name: zone
info: specifies the zone name

name: devname
info: name of network adapter

name: mysql_port
info: port number for mysql connection. Range: (1024, 65536) in integer

name: rpc_port
info: the port number for RPC protocol. Range: (1024, 65536) in integer

name: leak_mod_to_check
info: the name of the module under memory leak checks

name: config_additional_dir
info: additional directories of configure file

name: memory_reserved
info: the size of the system memory reserved for emergency internal use. Range: [10M, total size of memory]

name: ss_cache_maxsize_percpu
info: the maximum allowed local cache disk size per CPU per server in shared storage mode. Range: (0, +∞)

name: ss_cache_max_percentage
info: the maximum percentage of local cache disk space to total data in shared storage mode. Range: (0,100] in integer

name: datafile_disk_percentage
info: the percentage of disk space used by the data files. Range: [0,99] in integer

name: datafile_maxsize
info: the auto extend max size. Range: [0, +∞)

name: datafile_next
info: the auto extend step. Range: [0, +∞)

name: datafile_size
info: size of the data file. Range: [0, +∞)

name: redundancy_level
info: EXTERNAL: use extrernal redundancyNORMAL: tolerate one disk failureHIGH: tolerate two disk failure if disk count is enough

name: data_dir
info: the directory for the data file

name: schema_history_archive_expire_time
info: the expire time for schema history archived into __all_xxx_archived_history, 0 means disable GC, otherwise keep at least 30 days and at most 365 days. Default 0. Range: {0} & [30d, 365d]

name: ob_vector_search_strategy
info: The strategy of vector index searching. If it is set to RECALL_FIRST, which is default value, the search strategy is deep-search mode.If it is set to LATENCY_FIRST, the search strategy is response-first mode.

name: _append_update_global_indexes_for_dynamic_partition
info: specify whether to enable update global indexes for dynamic partition when dropping expired partitions.values: AUTO(follow _ob_enable_truncate_partition_preserve_global_index), ON, OFF

name: enable_mv_binlog_minimal_mode
info: Switch of the minimal mode for materialized view

name: enable_logonly_replica
info: controls whether logonly replica is enabled.Value:  True:turned on  False: turned off

name: enable_ls_leader_balance
info: controls whether LS leaders balance is turned on.Value:  True:turned on  False: turned off

name: ob_enable_python_udf
info: Enable or disable python udf.

name: approx_count_distinct_precision
info: specify the result accuracy of approx_count_distinct

name: mlog_trim_interval
info: Control the scheduling interval of MLOG background trimming tasks. Range: [5s, 30d]

name: enable_mlog_auto_maintenance
info: Switch of MLOG automated maintenance

name: _prexec_prepare_with_params
info: Control the prexec protocol prepare with or without parameters during the prepare phase.

name: default_micro_block_format_version
info: specify the default micro block format version when create table

name: load_data_diagnosis_log_max_size
info: [0,)whenever a write to the diagnosis log file causes its size to exceed the config value, it will be renamed and a new diagnosis log file using is opened, range: [0,)

name: load_data_diagnosis_log_compression
info: the type of compression for the diagnosis log file, values: AUTO, NONE, ZSTD, GZIP, DEFLATE

name: ob_enable_java_udf
info: Enable or disable java udf.

name: external_table_csv_max_buffer_size
info: Maximum buffer size for parsing CSV external table files. Range: [0B, +∞), default: 1G

name: external_table_io_range_size
info: deternimistic the maximum size in bytes of a combined range; if combining two consecutive ranges would produce a range of a size greater than this, they are not combined

name: external_table_io_hole_size
info: deternimistic the maximum distance in bytes between two consecutive ranges; beyond this value, ranges are not combined

name: ob_deterministic_udf_cache_max_size
info: deternimistic cache can use max size memory(in bytes). if it's zero, disable cache

name: ob_result_cache_evict_percentage
info: result cache hold memory over xx%(defalut 90) of total memory, try to evict cache obj.

name: result_cache_max_result
info: result_cache_max_result specifies the percentage of result_cache_max_size that any single result can use.

name: result_cache_max_size
info: result cache can use max size memory(in bytes) of library cache. if it's zero, disable result cache

name: zone_deploy_mode
info: control the zone deploy mode. Can be 'homo' or 'hetero'. homo: all zones of tenant resource pools must have the same unit count. hetero: the unit count in each zone of tenant resource pools can be different.

name: enable_clog_encryption
info: Enable or disable clog encryption.

name: default_table_merge_engine
info: Specify the default merge_engine when creating table: partial_update, delete_insert.

name: enable_pl_rich_error_msg
info: specifies whether add ip:port, time and trace id to PLSQL sqlerrm.

name: default_table_organization
info: The default_organization configuration option allows you to set the default table organization mode to either HEAP (unordered data storage) or INDEX (the data rows are held in an index defined on the primary key for the table) when creating new tables.

name: enable_adaptive_plan_cache
info: enable/disable adaptive plan cache

name: px_node_policy
info: Determining the candidate pool for PX calculation nodes."DATA": All data nodes involved in the current SQL."ZONE": All nodes within the zones involved in the current SQL that belong to the tenant."CLUSTER": All nodes involved by the current tenant.

name: package_state_sync_max_size
info: the max sync size of single package state that can sync package var value. If over it, package state will not sync package var value. Range: [0, 16777216] in integer

name: query_memory_limit_percentage
info: the percentage of tenant memory that can be used by a single SQL. The default value is 50. Range: [0,100]

name: ob_encoding_granularity
info: Maximum rows for encoding in one micro block. Range:[8192,1048576]

name: attach_shared_sstable_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of attach shared sstable to local storage Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: inc_sstable_upload_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of upload incremental sstable to shared storage Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: _system_trig_enabled
info: Enable or disable system trigger feature.

name: enable_ps_parameterize
info: Used to control enable or disable parameterization in PS statement parsing

name: load_vector_index_on_follower
info: Specifies whether the follower automatically loads the memory vector index.

name: vector_index_memory_saving_mode
info: Specifies whether to enable the vector index memory saving mode. This can reduce the memory used by the partition table vector index rebuild.

name: ob_vector_memory_limit_percentage
info: Used to control the upper limit percentage of memory resources that the vector_index module can use. Range:[0, 100).The system will adjust automatically if ob_vector_memory_limit_percentage set to 0(by default).

name: kv_group_commit_rw_mode
info: Used to specify the read/write operation types when group commit is enable. Values: 'ALL' means enable all operations, 'READ' mean only enable read operation in group commit, 'WRITE'  means only write operations in group commit.

name: kv_group_commit_batch_size
info: Used to specify the batch size of each group commit batch in OBKV. Values: 1 means sinlge operaion in each batch, equally to disable group commit. When batch size is greater than 1, it means group commit is enable and used as its batch size.

name: _enable_ddl_worker_isolation
info: a switch controling ddl thread isolation

name: direct_load_allow_fallback
info: Control whether an error is reported when direct load of the derivative operation scenario is not supported.

name: default_load_mode
info: Specifies default load data path."DISABLED" represent load data not in direct load path (default value)."FULL_DIRECT_WRITE" represent load data in full direct load path with insert semantics."INC_DIRECT_WRITE" represent load data in inc direct load path with insert semantics."INC_REPLACE_DIRECT_WRITE" represent load data in inc direct load path with replace semantics.

name: enable_lock_priority
info: specifies whether to enable lock priority, which, when activated, gives certain DDL operations the highest table lock precedence.

name: sql_plan_management_mode
info: Specifies how spm work."Disable" represent disable spm (default value)."OnlineEvolve" represent evolve plan online.

name: lob_enable_block_cache_threshold
info: For outrow-stored LOBs, if the length is less than or equal to that threshold, they can be admitted into the block cache to speed up the next query.

name: choose_migration_source_policy
info: the policy of choose source in migration and add replica. 'idc' means firstly choose follower replica of the same idc as source, 'region' means firstly choose follower replica of the same region as source

name: json_document_max_depth
info: maximum nesting depth allowed in a JSON document

name: max_partition_num
info: set max partition num in mysql mode

name: optimizer_index_cost_adj
info: adjust costing of index scan

name: kv_hbase_client_scanner_timeout_period
info: OBKV Hbase client scanner query timeout, which unit is milliseconds. Range: (0, +∞) in integer. Especially, 60000 means default value

name: shared_log_retention
info: Retention time of log files on shared storage

name: ttl_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of ttl thread. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: enable_hbase_rowkey_ttl
info: specifies whether rowkey ttl task is enabled for hbase

name: enable_kv_ttl
info: specifies whether ttl task is enbled

name: kv_ttl_history_recycle_interval
info: the time to recycle ttl history. Range: [1d, 180d]

name: vector_index_optimize_duty_time
info: A runtime range bounded by start time and end time for vector index background task, e.g., [23:00:00, 24:00:00]

name: kv_ttl_duty_duration
info: ttl background task working time durationbegin_time or end_time in Range, e.g., [23:00:00, 24:00:00]

name: global_index_auto_split_policy
info: if the auto-partition clause is not used, this config judge whether to enable auto-partition for global index.DISTRIBUTED: enable auto-partition for creating global index if tenant has multiple nodes, e.g., multiple primary zones or multiple units;ALL: enable auto-partition for creating all global index;OFF: disable auto-partition for all global index.

name: auto_split_tablet_size
info: when create an auto-partitioned table in "create table" syntax or modify a table as an auto-partitioned table in "alter table" syntax,if the splitting threshold of tablet size is not setted,this config will be setted as the threshold of the table.Note that the modification of this config will not affect the created auto-partitioned table.Range: [128M, +∞)

name: enable_auto_split
info: if the auto-partition clause is not used, this config judge whether to enable auto-partition for creating table.

name: default_skip_index_level
info: Specify the default skip_index_level value when creating table0: not set skip index in inc data, 1: set skip index in inc data according to the base data

name: range_optimizer_max_mem_size
info: to limit the memory consumption for the query range optimizer. Range: [0M,+∞), 0 stands for unlimited

name: enable_user_defined_rewrite_rules
info: specify whether the user defined rewrite rules are enabled. Value: True: enable  False: disable

name: dump_data_dictionary_to_log_interval
info: data dictionary dump to log(SYS LS) intervalRange: (0s,+∞)

name: tenant_sql_net_thread_count
info: the number of mysql I/O threads for a tenant. Range: [0, 64] in integer, 0 stands for unit_min_cpu

name: tenant_sql_login_thread_count
info: the number of threads for sql login request of each tenant. Range: [0, 32] in integer, 0 stands for unit_min_cpu

name: arbitration_timeout
info: The timeout before automatically degrading when arbitration member exists. Range: [3s,+∞]

name: query_response_time_range_base
info: Select base of log for QUERY_RESPONSE_TIME ranges. WARNING: variable change takes affect only after flush.The default value is 10. Range: [2,10000].

name: query_response_time_flush
info: Flush QUERY_RESPONSE_TIME table and re-read query_response_time_range_baseThe default value is False. Value: TRUE: trigger flush FALSE: do not trigger

name: query_response_time_stats
info: Enable or disable QUERY_RESPONSE_TIME statistics collectingThe default value is True. Value: TRUE: turned on FALSE: turned off

name: _ob_immediate_row_conflict_check
info: By default, OB's MySQL mode will check unique conflicts row by row after the update.When the switch is turned off, it will only check whether the final state of a batch of data after the update satisfies the unique constraint.

name: default_enable_extended_rowid
info: specifies whether to create table as extended rowid mode or not

name: ob_query_switch_leader_retry_timeout
info: max time spend on retry caused by leader swith or network disconnectionRange: [0ms, +∞)

name: default_auto_increment_mode
info: specifies default auto-increment mode, default is 'order'

name: enable_sql_extension
info: specifies whether to allow use some oracle mode features in mysql mode

name: job_queue_processes
info: specifies the maximum number of job slaves per instance that can be created for the execution of DBMS_JOB jobs and Oracle Scheduler (DBMS_SCHEDULER) jobs.

name: ob_proxy_readonly_transaction_routing_policy
info: Proxy route policy for readonly sql: whether regard begining read only stmts as in transaction

name: connection_control_max_connection_delay
info: The maximum delay in milliseconds for server response to failed connection attempts, if connection_control_failed_connections_threshold is greater than zero

name: connection_control_min_connection_delay
info: The minimum delay in milliseconds for server response to failed connection attempts, if connection_control_failed_connections_threshold is greater than zero.

name: connection_control_failed_connections_threshold
info: The number of consecutive failed connection attempts permitted to accountsbefore the server adds a delay for subsequent connection attempts

name: _enable_das_batch_rescan_flag
info: enable das batch rescan for multiple scenarios.

name: _enable_spf_batch_rescan
info: enable das batch rescan for subplan filter

name: open_cursors
info: specifies the maximum number of open cursors a session can have at once.can use this parameter to prevent a session from opening an excessive number of cursors.Range: [0, 65535] in integer

name: ob_ssl_invited_common_names
info: when server use ssl, use it to control client identity with ssl subject common name. default NONE

name: suspend_storage_cache_task
info: Suspend background caching tasks.

name: enable_manual_storage_cache_policy
info: enable user manual storage cache policy.

name: default_storage_cache_policy
info: default storage cache policy for tenant, values: HOT/AUTO

name: sts_credential
info: STS credential for object storage, values: sts_url=xxx&sts_ak=xxx&sts_sk=xxx

name: plsql_v2_compatibility
info: allows to control store routine compile action at DDL stage

name: plsql_debug
info: specifies whether or not PL/SQL library units will be compiled for debugging

name: plsql_code_type
info: specifies the compilation mode for PL/SQL library units

name: tde_method
info: none : transparent encryption is none, none means cannot use tde, internal : transparent encryption is in the form of internal tables, bkmi : transparent encryption is in the form of external bkmi

name: external_kms_info
info: when using the external key management center, this parameter will store some key management information

name: ob_enable_batched_multi_statement
info: enable use of batched multi statement

name: backup_data_file_size
info: backup data file size. Range: [512M, 4G] in integer

name: audit_log_encryption
info: the type of encryption for the audit log file, values: NONE, AES

name: audit_log_strategy
info: the logging method used by the audit log plugin. ASYNCHRONOUS: Log asynchronously. Wait for space in the output buffer. PERFORMANCE: Log asynchronously. Drop requests when there is insufficient buffer. SYNCHRONOUS: Log synchronously.

name: audit_log_rotate_on_size
info: [0,)whenever a write to the audit log file causes its size to exceed the config value, it will be renamed and a new audit log file using is opened, range: [0,)

name: audit_log_query_sql
info: how to record the query sql. ALL: record the original query sql. NONE: not to record query sql.

name: audit_log_prune_seconds
info: the number of seconds after which audit log files become subject to pruning, range: [0,)

name: audit_log_max_size
info: the maximum combined size of the audit log files

name: audit_log_format
info: the audit log file format, values: CSV

name: audit_log_path
info: the directory of the audit log

name: audit_log_compression
info: the type of compression for the audit log file, values: NONE, ZSTD

name: audit_log_buffer_size
info: [16M,)the buffer size of async audit logRange: [16M, total size of memory]

name: audit_log_enable
info: whether enable audit log

name: audit_trail
info: enables or disables database auditing, support NONE;OS;DB;DB,EXTENDED;DB_EXTENDED

name: audit_sys_operations
info: whether trace sys user operations

name: sql_work_area
info: Work area memory limitation for tenant

name: ob_compaction_schedule_interval
info: the time interval to schedule compaction, Range: [3s,5m]Range: [3s, 5m]

name: major_compact_trigger
info: specifies how many minor freeze should be triggered between two major freeze, Range: [0,65535] in integer

name: mds_minor_compact_trigger
info: minor_compact_trigger, Range: [2,16] in integer

name: minor_compact_trigger
info: minor_compact_trigger, Range: [0,16] in integer

name: ddl_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of ddl thread. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: ha_low_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of high availability low thread. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: ha_mid_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of high availability mid thread. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: ha_high_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of high availability high thread. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: mds_compaction_high_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of mds high priority compaction. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: compaction_high_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of high priority compaction. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: mds_compaction_mid_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of mds middle priority compaction. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: compaction_mid_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of middle priority compaction. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: compaction_low_thread_score
info: the current work thread score of low priority compaction. Range: [0,100] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: compaction_schedule_tablet_batch_cnt
info: the batch size when scheduling tablet to execute compaction task. Range: [10000,500000] in integer. default value is 50000

name: compaction_dag_cnt_limit
info: the compaction dag count limit. Range: [10000,500000] in integer. default value is 50000

name: rpc_memory_limit_percentage
info: maximum memory for rpc in a tenant, as a percentage of total tenant memory, and 0 means no limit to rpc memory

name: enable_early_lock_release
info: enable early lock release

name: merger_check_interval
info: the time interval between the schedules of the task that checks on the progress of MERGE for each zone. Range: [10s, 60m]

name: major_freeze_duty_time
info: the start time of system daily merge procedure. Range: [00:00, 24:00)

name: replica_parallel_migration_mode
info: specify the strategy for parallel migration of LS replicas. 'auto' means to allow parallel migration of LS replica of standby tenant and prohibit the parallel migration of LS replica of primary tenant. 'on' means to allow parallel migration of LS replica of primary tenant and standby tenant. 'off' means to prohibit parallel migration of LS replica of primary tenant and standby tenant

name: enable_database_sharding_none
info: Enable automatic creation of sharding none tablegroup for new databases in MySQL mode.

name: enable_gts_standalone
info: Parameters can allow sys LS occupy unit list standalone. Value: True: turned on; False: turned off.

name: ls_scale_out_factor
info: Parameters can allow tenant to have enough LS to meet the scaling requirements, and disabling transfer when scaling can also achieve a flat effect. Default value 1. Range: [1, +∞)]

name: zone_disk_balance_tolerance_percentage
info: controls the tolerance level of the inter-zone disk balancing algorithm for tablegroups. Disk rebalancing is triggered only when the difference between the highest and lowest disk usage zones exceeds the tolerance percentage of the highest zone's usage. Range: [1, 100] in percentage; setting 100 means disable inter-zone tablegroup disk balance.

name: partition_balance_schedule_interval
info: the time interval between generate partition balance task. The value should be no less than balancer_idle_time to enable partition balance. Default value 2h and the value 0s means disable partition balance. Range: [0s, +∞)

name: balancer_idle_time
info: the time interval between the schedules of the tenant load-balancing task. Range: [10s, +∞)

name: enable_transfer
info: controls whether transfers are allowed in the tenant. This config does not take effect when enable_rebalance is disabled. Value:  True:turned on  False:turned off

name: enable_rebalance
info: specifies whether the tenant load-balancing is turned on. Value:  True:turned on  False: turned off

name: standby_db_preferred_upstream_log_region
info: The preferred upstream log region for Standby db. The Standby db will give priority to the preferred upstream log region to fetch log. For high availability，the Standby db will also switch to the other region when the preferred upstream log region can not fetch log because of exception etc.

name: archive_lag_target
info: The lag target of the log archive. The log archive target affects not only the backup availability, but also the lag of the standby database based on archive. Values larger than 7200s are not reasonable lag. The typical value is 120s. Extremely low values can result in high IOPS, which is not optimal for object storage; such values can also affect the performance of the database. The value 0ms means to archive as soon as possible. Range: [0ms,7200s]

name: standby_db_fetch_log_rpc_timeout
info: The threshold for detecting the RPC timeout for the standby tenant to fetch log from the log restore source tenant. When the rpc timeout, the log transport service switches to another server of the log restore source tenant to fetch logs. Range: [2s, +∞)

name: ls_gc_delay_time
info: The max delay time for ls gc when log archive is off. The default value is 0s. Range: [0s, +∞). The ls delay deletion mechanism will no longer take effect when the tenant is dropped.

name: log_disk_throttling_maximum_duration
info: maximum duration of log disk throttling, that is the time remaining until the log disk space is exhausted after log disk throttling triggered.

name: log_disk_throttling_percentage
info: the threshold of the size of the log disk when writing_limit will be triggered. Rang:[40,100]. setting 100 means turn off writing limit

name: log_disk_utilization_threshold
info: log disk utilization threshold before reuse log files, should be smaller than log_disk_utilization_limit_threshold. Range: [10, 100)

name: log_disk_utilization_limit_threshold
info: maximum of log disk usage percentage before stop submitting or receiving logs, should be bigger than log_disk_utilization_threshold. Range: [80, 100]

name: log_archive_concurrency
info: log archive concurrency, for both archive fetcher and sender. If the value is default 0, the database will automatically calculate the number of archive worker threads based on the tenant specification, which is tenant max_cpu divided by 4; otherwise set the the worker count equals to the value.Range: [0, 100] in integer

name: log_restore_concurrency
info: log restore concurrency, for both the restore tenant and standby tenant. If the value is default 0, the database will automatically calculate the number of restore worker threads based on the tenant specification, which is tenant max_cpu; otherwise set the the worker count equals to the value.Range: [0, 100] in integer

name: log_storage_compress_func
info: specifies the algorithms used for log storage compression. Values: lz4_1.0, zstd_1.0, zstd_1.3.8

name: log_storage_compress_all
info: specifies whether to compress logs before storing. The default is false(no compression)

name: log_transport_compress_func
info: compressor used for log transport. Values: none, lz4_1.0, zstd_1.0, zstd_1.3.8

name: log_transport_compress_all
info: If this option is set to true, use compression for log transport. The default is false(no compression)

name: _parallel_ddl_control
info: switch for parallel capability of parallel DDL

name: compatible
info: compatible version for persisted data

name: _enable_filter_reordering
info: enable filter reordering in storage engine

name: temporary_file_max_disk_size
info: maximum disk usage of temporary file on a single node, 0 means no limit. Range: [0,+∞)

name: workarea_size_policy
info: policy used to size SQL working areas (MANUAL/AUTO)

name: default_progressive_merge_num
info: default progressive_merge_num when tenant create tableRange:[0,)

name: writing_throttling_maximum_duration
info: maximum duration of writting throttling(in minutes), max value is 3 days

name: writing_throttling_trigger_percentage
info: the threshold of the size of the mem store when writing_limit will be triggered. Rang:(0,100]. setting 100 means turn off writing limit

name: freeze_trigger_percentage
info: the threshold of the size of the mem store when freeze will be triggered. Rang:(0,100)

name: _enable_mysql_compatible_dates
info: Specifies whether to use MySQL-compatible date format that allows for invalid dates.

name: undo_retention
info: the low threshold value of undo retention. The system retains undo for at least the time specified in this config when active txn protection is banned. Range: [0, 4294967295]

name: px_workers_per_cpu_quota
info: the ratio(integer) between the number of system allocated px workers vs the maximum number of threads that can be scheduled concurrently. Range: [0, 20]

name: cpu_quota_concurrency
info: max allowed concurrency for 1 CPU quota. Range: [1,20]

name: enable_monotonic_weak_read
info: specifies observer supportting atomicity and monotonic order read

name: max_stale_time_for_weak_consistency
info: the max data stale time that cluster weak read version behind current timestamp,no smaller than weak_read_version_refresh_interval, range: [5s, +∞)

name: spill_compression_codec
info: specific the compression algorithm type to compress the spilled data in temp block store during the sql execution phase. The supported compression codecs are: ZSTD, LZ4, SNAPPY, ZLIB. NONE means no compression.The default value is NONE.

name: recover_table_dop
info: The maximum degree of parallel of the single table recovery during the cross-tenant table import stage of tables recovery.Range: [0,) in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: recover_table_concurrency
info: The maximum number of tables that can be recovered concurrently during the cross-tenant table import stage of tables recovery.Range: [0,16] in integer. Especially, 0 means default value

name: kv_transport_compress_threshold
info: Together with the configuration item kv_transport_compress_func, it is used to specify the minimum threshold size of the OBKV query result set that needs to be compressed. Range: [0, +∞)

name: kv_transport_compress_func
info: compressor used for tableAPI query result. Values: none, lz4_1.0, snappy_1.0, zlib_1.0, zstd_1.0 zstd 1.3.8

name: storage_rowsets_size
info: the row number processed by vectorized storage engine within one batch in column storage. Range: (0,1048576]

name: default_table_store_format
info: Specify the default storage format of creating table: row, column, compound format of row and columnvalues: row, column, compound

name: schema_history_expire_time
info: the expire time for schema history, from 1min to 30days, with default 7days. Range: [1m, 30d]
